claim: Long-horizon agents that can persist and recover from failure are reshaping work layers; this capability shift defines current AGI milestone, not previous definitions.
actionable: Evaluate AI systems by their ability to persist toward goals and recover from failure, not just benchmark performance.
source_title: This is AGI: Sequoia AI Ascent 2026 Keynote

claim: AI is a revolution in computation (information processing), not just communication; this creates a fundamentally different shape of technology wave than internet/mobile.
actionable: Understand that AI's core advantage is processing, not distribution; build strategies around computational leverage, not network effects.
source_title: This is AGI: Sequoia AI Ascent 2026 Keynote

claim: Services (custom solutions) are becoming as large a TAM as software itself; AI enables delivery of personalized expertise (legal, medical, financial) at scale.
actionable: Shift from building generic software products toward AI-powered custom services tailored to specific industries and use cases.
source_title: This is AGI: Sequoia AI Ascent 2026 Keynote

claim: The diffusion gap is the opportunity: foundation model capabilities are created faster than they're adopted by enterprises, widening the edge for builders.
actionable: Build application-layer tools that make frontier capabilities accessible to enterprises lagging in adoption; focus on affordance and ease of use.
source_title: This is AGI: Sequoia AI Ascent 2026 Keynote

claim: Customer-back strategy beats tech-out approach; wrap yourself around customers (whose needs change slowly) rather than chasing fast-moving capabilities.
actionable: Prioritize deep customer relationships and understanding over cutting-edge capability matching; durability comes from customer fit, not tech parity.
source_title: This is AGI: Sequoia AI Ascent 2026 Keynote

claim: Model context (test harness performance on long-horizon tasks) has improved from tens of minutes to hours in one year, enabling genuinely long-running agents.
actionable: Test new models on multi-hour agentic tasks; context window and reasoning stability over time are now key differentiators.
source_title: This is AGI: Sequoia AI Ascent 2026 Keynote

claim: The progression is from tab completion → single-agent development → agent teams → async background agents → agents that spawn sub-agents.
actionable: Plan for agentic architectures that support background tasks and hierarchical agent spawning; don't lock into single-agent synchronous patterns.

claim: Agents are infinitely scalable with compute; hiring agents costs tokens vs. salaries; agents don't need healthcare or motivation—fundamental economics favor agents.
actionable: Build systems where agent deployment is the default; economics will naturally drive substitution of agents for high-volume cognitive tasks.
source_title: This is AGI: Sequoia AI Ascent 2026 Keynote

claim: Reinforcement learning on agents drives self-improvement; agents are being trained in RL gyms pushing performance across mechanical engineering, design, finance.
actionable: Invest in RL training harnesses for agent tasks; RL is unlocking capabilities beyond supervised fine-tuning.
source_title: This is AGI: Sequoia AI Ascent 2026 Keynote

claim: Compressed timelines with agents: Zed completed a 3-year moonshot solo using Claude Code; Notion rewrote 8M lines of code in 6 weeks.
actionable: Use code agents for large-scale refactoring and greenfield development; factor 10-50X speedup into project planning.
source_title: This is AGI: Sequoia AI Ascent 2026 Keynote

claim: Alien design: AI-optimized artifacts (antennas, chips, buildings) are non-intuitive to humans but dramatically outperform human design; need to embrace unfamiliar solutions.
actionable: Accept AI-generated designs that don't match human intuition; validate by performance, not aesthetics or human comprehension.
source_title: This is AGI: Sequoia AI Ascent 2026 Keynote

claim: Within 100 years of industrial revolution, 99% of physical work became machine-driven; similar transformation expected for cognition with AI.
actionable: Prepare for a cognitive revolution as profound as the industrial one; expect most cognitive work to be AI-driven within decades.
source_title: This is AGI: Sequoia AI Ascent 2026 Keynote
